definition.name: spectrahedron
definition.definition: A spectrahedron is the feasible set of a semidefinite program. Typically defined as C = {X ∈ PSD_n : ⟨A_j, X⟩ = β_j, j = 1,...,m} for symmetric matrices A_j and scalars β_j. More generally, defined by one or more linear matrix inequalities (LMIs).
